name: agience-flare-dkg-integration
description: npm wrapper for the Agience FLARE × DKG v10 Integration. Governance layer above DKG v10: commit-gated Agience artifacts → typed agience: RDF Knowledge Assets in Working Memory and Shared Memory via the local DKG v10 daemon HTTP API or MCP Streamable HTTP. Wrapper delegates to the Python CLI (agience-dkg) shipped on PyPI as agience-flare-dkg-integration.
author: Manoj Modhwadia <manojmodhwadia@outlook.com>
